code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part_opt = parts.get(i)
    let part = match part_opt
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n_opt = string.parse_int(part)
    let n = match n_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let doubled = n * 2
    if i == 0
      result = "#{doubled}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
